title: Dragon's Dogma 2

notes:
Wine-error vkLatencySleepNV can be avoided if using the launch options and Proton 8.0-5. 

Got to the menu, changed some settings like going fullscreen and upping the resolution and started playing. Intro cutscene was very out of sync and I paused the game to try and quit to the menu. The game didn't like that and froze. I had to force end the game and restart it. 
Changing to fullscreen was a mistake because the game crashes when going into fullscreen automatically on startup. Wanted to revert the changes back manually in the config.ini file and Denuvo was like "nope". I think I can try again tomorrow.
